description: Pinned real PR-shaped diffs across languages for the review-surfaces effectiveness benchmark (BENCH.1). Each case pins a public repo + base/head commit SHAs; `node bench/run.mjs` clones the two commits on demand and runs the full `all` pipeline (mock provider). `expected_focus` is OPTIONAL (adds the top-5 recall metric); the other metrics need no annotation. Add cases freely — the harness aggregates whatever is listed. Target set: 20-30 across TS/Py/Go/Rust/JVM.

cases.head: 61d6d66d27911001b9b4d57ab93139f9ad61384b
cases.note: network-error handling source fix + new retry tests (the original empty-queue repro)

cases.head: ad460ea8f249db69c943a365fb84f3a59042d54e
cases.note: args validation logic + test + user-guide doc (doc must not rank above args.go)

cases.head: 954f5684e4841aad84a8eec7ace7b81a0d3f6831
cases.note: CLI source change + pre-commit config + uv.lock (lock must be excluded, cli.py is the focus)
